name: Aero Pro Race Jersey
description: Shift's flagship race-cut cycling jersey. Ultra-lightweight, moisture-wicking Italian Lycra with a full-length YKK zipper, 3 rear pockets, and a hidden zipped fourth pocket. Designed for maximum aerodynamic efficiency.

name: Carbon Bib Shorts Elite
description: Professional-grade bib shorts with a 6-panel anatomical construction and Italian Elastic Interface Cytech HP1 chamois. Provides superior comfort on climbs and long-distance rides.

name: Windbreaker Pro Jacket
description: Packable race-cut windbreaker with a DWR finish and WindTex fabric. Features reflective accents for low-light visibility and stows compactly into its own rear pocket.

name: Thermal Leg Warmers
description: Fleece-lined leg warmers designed for cold-weather riding below 12°C. Silicon gripper at the thigh and ankle ensures they stay in place even on the hardest efforts.

name: Team Edition Cycling Cap
description: Classic cotton-blend cycling cap with a short brim to shield from sun and rain. Fits under a helmet and features the Shift logo embroidered on the side panel.

name: Pro Grip Cycling Gloves
description: Half-finger cycling gloves with silicone grip pads on the palm and gel padding at the heel of the hand. Microfiber thumb wipe for on-bike use.

name: Aero Helmet — Prevail 3
description: The Specialized Prevail 3 ANGI helmet combines maximum ventilation with premium aerodynamics. Features Specialized ANGI crash sensor compatibility and MIPS protection system.

name: Winter Thermal Jersey
description: Giant's fleece-backed thermal jersey for cold morning rides. Windproof front panel and brushed inner fleece keep you warm without bulk. Full-length zip with windflap.
